name: Anthony Scaramucci
summary: Former White House communications director who later called Trump a 'clear and present danger' and described his behavior as early-stage fascism, and helped launch the pro-Biden Right Side PAC.

keyStatements.quote: We recognize that the president is a clear and present danger to the American society—the American culture.
keyStatements.context: Fox News interview with Howard Kurtz

keyStatements.quote: He may not have early-stage dementia, but he definitely has early-stage fascism.

timeline.event: Called Trump a 'clear and present danger'
timeline.significance: Public break with Trump on national TV

timeline.event: Helped launch Right Side PAC to support Joe Biden

credibility.background: Former White House Communications Director, hedge fund manager, financier

oppositionReasons: Called Trump a 'clear and present danger' to American society
Described Trump's behavior as early-stage fascism
Supported efforts to defeat Trump in 2020
endorsement: Supported Joe Biden in 2020 via Right Side PAC

sources.title: Anthony Scaramucci: The Left Should ‘Deprogram’ Trump Supporters Like They’re in a ‘Cult’
Anthony Scaramucci Predicts Trump Will Be Impeached and Removed From Office
GOP Operatives Launch PAC To Convince Republicans To Vote For Biden
